  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $vals=@(); for($j=0;$j -le 9;$j++){ $vals += ,$r.Get($j) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  [void]$rows.Add($vals)')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  L ("row"+$i+" name=["+$vals[0]+"] path=["+$vals[7]+"]")')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  # delete each
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('foreach($vals in $rows){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  try{')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('    $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName)')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("    `$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])'))")
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("    SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]")
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('    $rm.Delete(); L ("deleted path="+$vals[7])')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  } catch { L ("delerr "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  # write good ones with new path (skip empty name leftovers)
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('foreach($vals in $rows){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $nm=[string]$vals[0]')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($nm)){ L "skip empty"; continue }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  try{')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('    $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName)')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("    `$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])'))")
    if ($k -eq 7) {
      [void]$sb.AppendLine('    SetP $rm $pn $newPath')
    } else {
      [void]$sb.AppendLine("    SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]")
    }
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('    $rm.Write(); L ("wrote name="+$nm+" path="+$newPath)')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  } catch { L ("writeerr "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t2=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("final_cnt="+$t2.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t2.Count();$i++){ $r=$t2.Get($i); L ("final name=["+$r.Get(0)+"] path=["+$r.Get(7)+"]") }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('L "DONE"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('} catch { L ("ERR "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\fix_path_fe3.ps1", $sb.ToString(), [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\fix_path_fe3.ps1"
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$bak\fix_path_fe3.log"))
}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec); Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0430))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'

  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2

  # Map share for Elena session via cmdkey + net use
  cmdkey /add:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 | Out-Null
  cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8'
  # write test file
  'test' | Out-File '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out\_write_test.txt' -Encoding ASCII
  "WRITE_OK=$(Test-Path '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out\_write_test.txt')"

  # Run export EPF as Elena, 3 min max
  Remove-Item "$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit","$bak\epf_run.log" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $epf="$bak\ExportFrontolPrice.epf"
  $runPs = @"
`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8'
`$arg = 'ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "' + '$epf' + '" /Out "' + '$bak\epf_run.log' + '"'
`$p = Start-Process -FilePath '$bin' -ArgumentList `$arg -PassThru
if (-not `$p.WaitForExit(180000)) { Stop-Process -Id `$p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' 'TIMEOUT' } else { Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' ([string]`$p.ExitCode) }
Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1", $runPs, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
  $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')
  $tn='ExportFrontolEPF'
  try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
  $task=$service.NewTask(0)
  $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
  $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.ExecutionTimeLimit='PT4M'
  $task.Principal.UserId=$elena; $task.Principal.LogonType=3; $task.Principal.RunLevel=1
  $a=$task.Actions.Create(0); $a.Path='powershell.exe'; $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
  $root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null

  $t0=Get-Date
  while(-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 200){ Start-Sleep 5 }
  "DONE=$(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") EXIT=$(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue)"
  if (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.log") { "LOG:"; Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.log" -Encoding Default }
  Get-Process 1cv8 -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force

  "=== OUT FILES ==="
  Get-ChildItem '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out' -Recurse -File -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200
}

    "`$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qB64'))",
    '$t=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("SETTINGS="+$t.Count())',
    'for($i=0;$i -lt $t.Count();$i++){ $r=$t.Get($i); L ("S"+$i+" name=["+$r.Get(0)+"] full=["+$r.Get(1)+"] kassa=["+$r.Get(2)+"] path=["+$r.Get(3)+"] auto="+$r.Get(4)+" checks="+$r.Get(5)) }',
    "`$q2=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q2.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qOffB64'))",
    '$t2=$q2.Execute().Unload(); L ("OFFLINE="+$t2.Count())',
    'for($i=0;$i -lt $t2.Count();$i++){ L ("O"+$i+" ["+$t2.Get($i).Get(1)+"]") }',
    '[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))'
  )
  [IO.File]::WriteAllLines("$bak\exch_list.ps1", $lines, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\exch_list.ps1"
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$bak\exch_list.log"))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\exch_list_out.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))

content.text:
<mcp_meta_tools>
You have access to MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools through `GetMcpTools` and `CallMcpTool`.

## MCP Tool Discovery and Invocation

Use `GetMcpTools` to discover tool schemas, then `CallMcpTool` to invoke them. Aim to minimize round-trips: ideally one `GetMcpTools` call followed by one `CallMcpTool` call.

If the user mentions, references, or links to a product or service that corresponds to an available MCP server, and the request likely depends on information from that service, proactively inspect that MCP server before answering. Do not wait for the user to explicitly ask you to use MCP. If you are unsure which server matches, use `GetMcpTools` with a pattern based on the service name.

`GetMcpTools` supports four modes:

1. `{"server":"<id>"}`: returns full input schemas and full descriptions for every tool on that server. Preferred when you know which server to use.
2. `{"server":"<id>","toolName":"<name>"}`: returns the full schema and full description for one tool.
3. `{"pattern":"<regex>"}`: searches tool and server names across all servers using RE2 syntax (no backreferences, lookahead, or lookbehind). Use when you're unsure which server has the tool you need.
4. No arguments: returns a catalog of all servers with tool names and short descriptions. Only use this if you have no idea which server or tool to look for вАФ in most cases, prefer fetching by server or pattern instead.

Pattern-search and catalog results shorten long descriptions, marked by a trailing "... [truncated]"; server and single-tool lookups always return the complete description.

MANDATORY - Always call `GetMcpTools` to discover a tool's schema before invoking it with `CallMcpTool`. If you already know the server, go directly to it rather than listing the full catalog first.

If the available MCP tools do not fully support what the user asked you to do, complete the work you can with the current tool set. In your work summary, include what you were unable to do with MCP and why. Do not use browser automation to work around missing or unavailable MCP tools unless the user explicitly asks you to use the browser.

Available MCP servers:

<mcp_meta_tool_servers>
<mcp_meta_tool_server name="cursor-app-control" tools="move_agent_to_root, move_agent_to_cloned_root, create_project, rename_chat, cursor_dialog, open_resource, open_automation" />
<mcp_meta_tool_server name="cursor-ide-browser" tools="browser_navigate, browser_snapshot, browser_click, browser_mouse_click_xy, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, browser_drag, browser_get_bounding_box, browser_highlight, browser_tabs, browser_cdp, browser_take_screenshot, browser_lock" serverUseInstructions="The cursor-ide-browser MCP server provides a Cursor-owned browser tab plus a raw Chrome DevTools Protocol command tool.

CORE WORKFLOW:
1. Start by understanding the user's goal and what success looks like on the page.
2. Use browser_tabs with action "list" to inspect open tabs and URLs before acting.
3. Use browser_navigate to create or navigate the target tab. Omit the position parameter for background automation so focus is preserved.
4. Use browser_lock before longer automation on an existing tab, then browser_lock with action "unlock" when finished.
5. Use browser_snapshot for accessibility context and browser_take_screenshot for visual verification.
6. Use browser_click, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, and browser_drag for page interactions.
7. Use browser_highlight and browser_get_bounding_box for visual grounding and coordinate diagnostics.
8. Use browser_cdp for page inspection, profiling, runtime evaluation, DOM/CSS queries, and performance data.

AVOID RABBIT HOLES:
1. Do not repeat the same failing action more than once without new evidence such as a fresh snapshot, a different ref, a changed page state, or a clear new hypothesis.
2. IMPORTANT: If four attempts fail or progress stalls, stop acting and report what you observed, what blocked progress, and the most likely next step.
3. Prefer gathering evidence over brute force. If the page is confusing, use browser_snapshot, browser_take_screenshot, or CDP inspection before trying more actions.
4. If you encounter a blocker such as login, passkey/manual user interaction, permissions, captchas, destructive confirmations, missing data, or an unexpected state, stop and report it instead of improvising repeated actions.
5. Do not get stuck in wait-action-wait loops. Every retry should be justified by something newly observed.

CRITICAL - Lock/unlock workflow:
1. browser_lock requires an existing browser tab - you CANNOT call browser_lock with action: "lock" before browser_navigate
2. Correct order: browser_navigate -> browser_lock({ action: "lock" }) -> (interactions) -> browser_lock({ action: "unlock" })
3. If a browser tab already exists (check with browser_tabs list), call browser_lock with action: "lock" FIRST before any interactions
4. Only call browser_lock with action: "unlock" when completely done with ALL browser operations for this turn

IMPORTANT - Waiting strategy:
When waiting for page changes, prefer short CDP polling loops with Runtime.evaluate, DOM queries, Page lifecycle signals, or browser_snapshot checks rather than a single long wait.

CDP USAGE:
- Use browser_cdp with a DevTools Protocol method and params object, for example Runtime.evaluate, DOM.getDocument, CSS.getComputedStyleForNode, Profiler.start/stop, Performance.getMetrics, Log.enable, and Network.enable.
- Do not use browser_cdp with CDP Input.* methods. They are denied because they are focus-sensitive in Electron webviews and can route input to Cursor UI instead of the browser page.
- Use browser_click, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, and browser_drag for clicks, typing, filling inputs, selecting options, keyboard actions, scrolling, and drag-and-drop.
- Use Runtime.evaluate for advanced DOM-scoped interactions that the dedicated browser tools do not cover.
- For profiling, call Profiler.enable, Profiler.start, reproduce the behavior, then Profiler.stop. The profile is saved to a file and returned as a log_file; read that file only when you need to inspect details.
- For JavaScript evaluation, prefer Runtime.evaluate with returnByValue when possible.
- Some browser-wide or sensitive CDP methods are denied, especially cookie, storage, permission, download, target-management, filesystem-backed file-input commands, system-level commands, and CDP navigation/history navigation commands.
- Large CDP responses are saved to files instead of being inlined. Prefer using the returned file path over immediately stuffing large payloads into context; read focused sections only when needed.

VISION:
- browser_take_screenshot attaches an image result that the model can inspect. CDP Page.captureScreenshot returns data inside JSON and should not replace browser_take_screenshot when visual verification is needed.

NOTES:
- browser_snapshot returns snapshot YAML and is the main source of truth for page structure.
- Refs are opaque handles tied to the latest browser_snapshot for that tab.
- Iframe content is not accessible - only elements outside iframes can be interacted with.
- When you stop to report a blocker, include the current page, the target you were trying to reach, the blocker you observed, and the best next action. If the blocker requires manual user interaction, ask the user to take over at that point rather than assuming it in advance." />
</mcp_meta_tool_servers>

## MCP Resource Access

You also have access to MCP resources via `FetchMcpResource`.
If a relevant server is marked as needing authentication, or if an MCP tool call fails with an authentication/authorization error, call `mcp_auth` for that server, then inspect that server again and retry the original request if appropriate. Do not call `mcp_auth` just because it is listed, and do not repeatedly call it if authentication did not fix the failure. Do not call `mcp_auth` in parallel; authenticate only one server at a time.
</mcp_meta_tools>

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

# Create per-kassa folders on Frontol
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $names = @(
    (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0031)), # –Ъ–∞—Б—Б–∞1
    (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032)), # –Ъ–∞—Б—Б–∞2
    (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0033))  # –Ъ–∞—Б—Б–∞3
  )
  foreach ($n in $names) {
    New-Item "C:\Frontol_Exchange\$n\rep" -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
    New-Item "C:\Frontol_Exchange\$n\In" -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
    New-Item "C:\Frontol_Exchange\$n\Out" -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
  }
  icacls 'C:\Frontol_Exchange' /grant 'usr1cv8:(OI)(CI)F' /T | Out-Null
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange' -Directory | Select-Object Name
}

$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2
  cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8' | Out-Null

  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $qText='–Т–Ђ–С–†–Р–Ґ–ђ –Ґ.–Э–∞–Є–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ, –Ґ.–Я–Њ–ї–љ–Њ–µ–Э–∞–Є–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ, –Ґ.–Ч–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–∞–І–µ–Ї–Њ–≤, –Ґ.–Э–µ–њ–Њ–ї–љ—Л–µ–Т—Л–µ–Љ–Ї–Є, –Ґ.–Ъ–Њ–љ–µ—З–љ—Л–µ–Т—Л–µ–Љ–Ї–Є, –Ґ.–Р–≤—В–Њ–Ј–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–∞, –Ґ.–Ю—Д–ї–∞–є–љ–Ю–±–Њ—А—Г–і–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ, –Ґ.–Я—Г—В—М–Ъ–§–ї–∞–≥—Г–Ч–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–Є, –Ґ.–°–Њ–Ј–і–∞–≤–∞—В—М–Ф–Њ–Ї—Г–Љ–µ–љ—В—Л–†–∞—Б–њ–∞–Ї–Њ–≤–Ї–Є–Ъ–µ–≥–∞, –Ґ.–Ч–∞–Љ–µ—Й–∞—В—М–Ю—В—З—С—В—Л, –Я–†–Х–Ф–°–Ґ–Р–Т–Ы–Х–Э–Ш–Х(–Ґ.–Ю—Д–ї–∞–є–љ–Ю–±–Њ—А—Г–і–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ) –Ъ–Р–Ъ –Ъ–∞—Б—Б–∞–Ш–Љ—П –Ш–Ч –†–µ–≥–Є—Б—В—А–°–≤–µ–і–µ–љ–Є–є.–Э–∞—Б—В—А–Њ–є–Ї–Є–Ю–±–Љ–µ–љ–∞Frontol –Ъ–Р–Ъ –Ґ'
  $qB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($qText))
  $regB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Э–∞—Б—В—А–Њ–є–Ї–Є–Ю–±–Љ–µ–љ–∞Frontol'))
  $propB64 = @{
    0=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Э–∞–Є–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ'))
    1=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Я–Њ–ї–љ–Њ–µ–Э–∞–Є–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ'))
    2=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Ч–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–∞–І–µ–Ї–Њ–≤'))
    3=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Э–µ–њ–Њ–ї–љ—Л–µ–Т—Л–µ–Љ–Ї–Є'))
    4=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Ъ–Њ–љ–µ—З–љ—Л–µ–Т—Л–µ–Љ–Ї–Є'))
    5=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Р–≤—В–Њ–Ј–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–∞'))
    6=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Ю—Д–ї–∞–є–љ–Ю–±–Њ—А—Г–і–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ'))
    7=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Я—Г—В—М–Ъ–§–ї–∞–≥—Г–Ч–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–Є'))
    8=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–°–Њ–Ј–і–∞–≤–∞—В—М–Ф–Њ–Ї—Г–Љ–µ–љ—В—Л–†–∞—Б–њ–∞–Ї–Њ–≤–Ї–Є–Ъ–µ–≥–∞'))
    9=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Ч–∞–Љ–µ—Й–∞—В—М–Ю—В—З—С—В—Л'))
  }
  $path1=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\' + (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0031)) + '\rep'))
  $path2=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\' + (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032)) + '\rep'))
  $path3=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\' + (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0033)) + '\rep'))

  $sb = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$ErrorActionPreference="Continue"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$log="D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\exch_split.log"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$m=New-Object Text.StringBuilder')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('function L($t){[void]$m.AppendLine([string]$t)}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('function SetP($o,$n,$v){$o.GetType().InvokeMember($n,"SetProperty",$null,$o,@($v))}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('try{')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$q34=[char]34; $ib=$c.Connect(("File="+$q34+"D:\1C_BACKUP"+$q34+";Usr="+$q34+$u+$q34+";")); L "connected"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$regName=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$regB64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$p1=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$path1'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$p2=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$path2'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$p3=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$path3'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qB64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("cnt="+$t.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$typeName="InformationRegisterRecordManager."+$regName')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$rows=New-Object System.Collections.ArrayList')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t.Count();$i++){ $r=$t.Get($i); $vals=@(); for($j=0;$j -le 9;$j++){ $vals+=,$r.Get($j) }; $kassa=[string]$r.Get(10); [void]$rows.Add(@{vals=$vals; kassa=$kassa}); L ("row kassa=["+$kassa+"] path=["+$vals[7]+"]") }')
  # delete all
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('foreach($row in $rows){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  try{ $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName); $vals=$row.vals')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("  `$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])')); SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]")
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $rm.Delete(); L ("deleted "+$row.kassa) } catch { L ("delerr "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  # write with per-kassa path
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('foreach($row in $rows){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $vals=$row.vals; $kassa=$row.kassa')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace([string]$vals[0]) -and [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($kassa)){ continue }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $newPath=$p1')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if($kassa -match "#2"|$kassa -match "2 -"){ $newPath=$p2 }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if($kassa -match "#3"|$kassa -match "3 -"){ $newPath=$p3 }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if($kassa -match "#1"){ $newPath=$p1 }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  try{ $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName)')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("  `$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])'))")
    if ($k -eq 7) { [void]$sb.AppendLine('  SetP $rm $pn $newPath') }
    else { [void]$sb.AppendLine("  SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]") }
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $rm.Write(); L ("wrote kassa="+$kassa+" path="+$newPath) } catch { L ("writeerr "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t2=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("final="+$t2.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t2.Count();$i++){ $r=$t2.Get($i); L ("final kassa=["+$r.Get(10)+"] path=["+$r.Get(7)+"]") }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('L "DONE"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('} catch { L ("ERR "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\exch_split.ps1", $sb.ToString(), [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  # Fix pipeline issue with -match | 
  $txt = [IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\exch_split.ps1", [Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
  $txt = $txt.Replace('if($kassa -match "#2"|$kassa -match "2 -"){ $newPath=$p2 }', 'if(($kassa -match "#2") -or ($kassa -match "2 -")){ $newPath=$p2 }')
  $txt = $txt.Replace('if($kassa -match "#3"|$kassa -match "3 -"){ $newPath=$p3 }', 'if(($kassa -match "#3") -or ($kassa -match "3 -")){ $newPath=$p3 }')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\exch_split.ps1", $txt, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\exch_split.ps1"
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$bak\exch_split.log"))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\exch_split_out.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))

$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))

  Start-Sleep 2

  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $qText='–Т–Ђ–С–†–Р–Ґ–ђ –Ґ.–Э–∞–Є–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ, –Ґ.–Я–Њ–ї–љ–Њ–µ–Э–∞–Є–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ, –Ґ.–Ч–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–∞–І–µ–Ї–Њ–≤, –Ґ.–Э–µ–њ–Њ–ї–љ—Л–µ–Т—Л–µ–Љ–Ї–Є, –Ґ.–Ъ–Њ–љ–µ—З–љ—Л–µ–Т—Л–µ–Љ–Ї–Є, –Ґ.–Р–≤—В–Њ–Ј–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–∞, –Ґ.–Ю—Д–ї–∞–є–љ–Ю–±–Њ—А—Г–і–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ, –Ґ.–Я—Г—В—М–Ъ–§–ї–∞–≥—Г–Ч–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–Є, –Ґ.–°–Њ–Ј–і–∞–≤–∞—В—М–Ф–Њ–Ї—Г–Љ–µ–љ—В—Л–†–∞—Б–њ–∞–Ї–Њ–≤–Ї–Є–Ъ–µ–≥–∞, –Ґ.–Ч–∞–Љ–µ—Й–∞—В—М–Ю—В—З—С—В—Л, –Я–†–Х–Ф–°–Ґ–Р–Т–Ы–Х–Э–Ш–Х(–Ґ.–Ю—Д–ї–∞–є–љ–Ю–±–Њ—А—Г–і–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ) –Ъ–Р–Ъ –Ъ–∞—Б—Б–∞–Ш–Љ—П –Ш–Ч –†–µ–≥–Є—Б—В—А–°–≤–µ–і–µ–љ–Є–є.–Э–∞—Б—В—А–Њ–є–Ї–Є–Ю–±–Љ–µ–љ–∞Frontol –Ъ–Р–Ъ –Ґ'
  $qB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($qText))
  $regB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Э–∞—Б—В—А–Њ–є–Ї–Є–Ю–±–Љ–µ–љ–∞Frontol'))
  $propB64 = @{
    0=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Э–∞–Є–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ'))
    1=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Я–Њ–ї–љ–Њ–µ–Э–∞–Є–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ'))
    2=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Ч–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–∞–І–µ–Ї–Њ–≤'))
    3=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Э–µ–њ–Њ–ї–љ—Л–µ–Т—Л–µ–Љ–Ї–Є'))
    4=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Ъ–Њ–љ–µ—З–љ—Л–µ–Т—Л–µ–Љ–Ї–Є'))
    5=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Р–≤—В–Њ–Ј–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–∞'))
    6=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Ю—Д–ї–∞–є–љ–Ю–±–Њ—А—Г–і–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ'))
    7=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Я—Г—В—М–Ъ–§–ї–∞–≥—Г–Ч–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–Є'))
    8=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–°–Њ–Ј–і–∞–≤–∞—В—М–Ф–Њ–Ї—Г–Љ–µ–љ—В—Л–†–∞—Б–њ–∞–Ї–Њ–≤–Ї–Є–Ъ–µ–≥–∞'))
    9=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('–Ч–∞–Љ–µ—Й–∞—В—М–Ю—В—З—С—В—Л'))
  }
  # old paths
  $path1=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('\\Kassa1\–Њ–±–Љ–µ–љ\–Ъ–∞—Б—Б–∞1\rep'))
  $path2=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('\\Kassa2\–Њ–±–Љ–µ–љ\–Ї–∞—Б—Б–∞2\rep'))

  $sb = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$ErrorActionPreference="Continue"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$log="D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\restore_old_paths.log"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$m=New-Object Text.StringBuilder')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('function L($t){[void]$m.AppendLine([string]$t)}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('function SetP($o,$n,$v){$o.GetType().InvokeMember($n,"SetProperty",$null,$o,@($v))}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('try{')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$q34=[char]34; $ib=$c.Connect(("File="+$q34+"D:\1C_BACKUP"+$q34+";Usr="+$q34+$u+$q34+";")); L "connected"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$regName=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$regB64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$p1=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$path1'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$p2=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$path2'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qB64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("cnt="+$t.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$typeName="InformationRegisterRecordManager."+$regName')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$rows=New-Object System.Collections.ArrayList')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t.Count();$i++){ $r=$t.Get($i); $vals=@(); for($j=0;$j -le 9;$j++){ $vals+=,$r.Get($j) }; $kassa=[string]$r.Get(10); [void]$rows.Add(@{vals=$vals; kassa=$kassa}); L ("row kassa=["+$kassa+"] path=["+$vals[7]+"]") }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('foreach($row in $rows){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  try{ $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName); $vals=$row.vals')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("  `$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])')); SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]")
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $rm.Delete(); L ("deleted "+$row.kassa) } catch { L ("delerr "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('foreach($row in $rows){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $vals=$row.vals; $kassa=$row.kassa')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace([string]$vals[0]) -and [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($kassa)){ continue }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $newPath=$p1')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if(($kassa -match "#2") -or ($kassa -match "2 -")){ $newPath=$p2 }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if($kassa -match "#1"){ $newPath=$p1 }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  try{ $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName)')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("  `$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])'))")
    if ($k -eq 7) { [void]$sb.AppendLine('  SetP $rm $pn $newPath') }
    else { [void]$sb.AppendLine("  SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]") }
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $rm.Write(); L ("wrote kassa="+$kassa+" path="+$newPath) } catch { L ("writeerr "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t2=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("final="+$t2.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t2.Count();$i++){ $r=$t2.Get($i); L ("final kassa=["+$r.Get(10)+"] path=["+$r.Get(7)+"]") }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('L "DONE"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('} catch { L ("ERR "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\restore_old_paths.ps1", $sb.ToString(), [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\restore_old_paths.ps1"
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$bak\restore_old_paths.log"))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\restore_old_paths_out.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))
Get-Content 'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\restore_old_paths_out.txt' -Encoding UTF8
